message:
fix: remove unnecessary SQLite type assertions from wisp gc, mol squash, mol burn

These three operations asserted *sqlite.SQLiteStorage but only called
DeleteIssue() which is already on the storage.Storage interface. This
caused hard failures on the Dolt backend. Now they work on any backend.

Closes dolt-test-zlwt, dolt-test-ek44, dolt-test-697r

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
